name: WF-500 Publishing Distribution Pack Canonical
description: Runs publishing lane: metadata generation → distribution planning → publish-readiness gating.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, dossier_context: { dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', pack: 'WF-500', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(), route: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_STANDARD', media_ready: !!$json.media_production_packet } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, pack_context: { child_workflows: ['CWF-510-platform-metadata-generator', 'CWF-520-distribution-planner', 'CWF-530-publish-readiness-checker'], primary_director: 'Krishna', strategic_authority: 'Chanakya', governance_authority: ['Yama', 'Krishna'] } } }];
